about_text.value: Core lexicon: petition, proof, gate, vault, field, mandate, drift. Payload is who gets to route legitimacy next.

characters.name: Docket
characters.description: Authority frame. Treats law as flow control.

characters.name: Shard
characters.description: Witness image. Converts hidden state into friction.

characters.name: Delta
characters.description: Vault monitor. No force, long memory.

text_script.value: Dock. Docket wants control. Shard wants exposure. Delta wants admissible trace.
dock silent gate
Silent gate accepted. Noise down.
Privileged token admitted. Symmetry down.
dock declared gate
Declared gate accepted. Sensors wake.
Skewed declaration reframes drift as sincerity.
Seal ring wants pre-stamped legitimacy.
seal route

Act I: route hardens; seam logged.

Act I: variance kept; basin count preserved.

seal basin
The chamber emits a final packet into the ending field.
The chamber biases the ending field without fully sealing it.
reopen basin
The chamber shears the ending field toward a rival basin.
The chamber keeps multiple endings alive for one more recompute.
Command offers finality through open force.

The chamber shears the ending field toward a rival basin.
The chamber keeps multiple endings alive for one more recompute.
Delta wins. Procedure becomes quiet enough to trust.
Shard wins. Authority survives by becoming inspectable.
Mandate wins. Command outranks consensus.
Drift wins. Adaptive error becomes governor.
No field clears. Docket persists by brittle truce.
